messages.content:
You are a hardware engineering assistant. Target board:
```json
{"id":"raspberry-pi-pico","name":"Raspberry Pi Pico","mcu":"RP2040","spi_default":{"sck":18,"miso":16,"mosi":19,"cs":17}}
```
Respond with working code and a brief explanation.
Mount an SD card on SPI0 and write 'hello' followed by millis() to log.txt every 5 seconds.

You are a hardware engineering assistant. Target board:
```json
{"id":"adafruit-feather-esp32-s3","name":"Adafruit Feather ESP32-S3","mcu":"ESP32-S3","spi_default":{"sck":36,"miso":37,"mosi":35,"cs":42}}
```
Respond with working code and a brief explanation.
Drive a 2.13 inch ePaper hat (SSD1680 controller) and show a centered 'hello'.

You are a hardware engineering assistant. Target board:
```json
{"id":"esp32-s3-devkitc-1","name":"ESP32-S3 DevKitC-1","mcu":"ESP32-S3","spi_default":{"sck":12,"miso":13,"mosi":11,"cs":10}}
```
Respond with working code and a brief explanation.
Talk to a generic SPI flash chip (W25Q64 family) and print the JEDEC ID.

You are a hardware engineering assistant. Target board:
```json
{"id":"arduino-uno-r4-wifi","name":"Arduino UNO R4 WiFi","mcu":"RA4M1","spi_default":{"sck":13,"miso":12,"mosi":11,"cs":10}}
```
Respond with working code and a brief explanation.
Drive an ST7735 1.8 inch TFT (160x128) and clear it to red.

You are a hardware engineering assistant. Target board:
```json
{"id":"adafruit-feather-nrf52840-sense","name":"Adafruit Feather nRF52840 Sense","mcu":"nRF52840","spi_default":{"sck":26,"miso":24,"mosi":25,"cs":null}}
```
Respond with working code and a brief explanation.
Mount an SD card on the default SPI bus with CS on D5 and list every file in the root directory.

You are a hardware engineering assistant. Target board:
```json
{"id":"raspberry-pi-pico-w","name":"Raspberry Pi Pico W","mcu":"RP2040","spi_default":{"sck":18,"miso":16,"mosi":19,"cs":17}}
```
Respond with working code and a brief explanation.
Bit-bang test: send 0xA5 over SPI0 every 10 ms and toggle the on-board LED.

You are a hardware engineering assistant. Target board:
```json
{"id":"esp32-s3-devkitc-1","name":"ESP32-S3 DevKitC-1","mcu":"ESP32-S3","spi_default":{"sck":12,"miso":13,"mosi":11,"cs":10}}
```
Respond with working code and a brief explanation.
Drive an SSD1351 1.5 inch RGB OLED via SPI and fill the screen with a slowly cycling hue.

You are a hardware engineering assistant. Target board:
```json
{"id":"arduino-nano-33-ble","name":"Arduino Nano 33 BLE","mcu":"nRF52840","spi_default":{"sck":13,"miso":12,"mosi":11,"cs":10}}
```
Respond with working code and a brief explanation.
Loopback SPI: tie MISO to MOSI, send 0x42, verify the read-back matches.

You are a hardware engineering assistant. Target board:
```json
{"id":"raspberry-pi-pico","name":"Raspberry Pi Pico","mcu":"RP2040"}
```
Respond with working code and a brief explanation.
Read a MAX6675 thermocouple amplifier on SPI and print the temperature in C every 500 ms.

You are a hardware engineering assistant. Target board:
```json
{"id":"adafruit-feather-esp32-s3","name":"Adafruit Feather ESP32-S3","mcu":"ESP32-S3","spi_default":{"sck":36,"miso":37,"mosi":35,"cs":42}}
```
Respond with working code and a brief explanation.
Initialize an SX1262 LoRa radio module and send 'ping' every 10 seconds.
